behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names tool path tools/split-file-verify/, SKILL.md path .claude/skills/split-file/SKILL.md, TSV format with sha256 first 16 chars, method format (Server).Start, sorting, usage-on-no-args behavior, and frontmatter fields name/description/argument-hint.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to build (AST parser, skill sections) without giving code or exact line edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (declaration names, sorted output, method formatting, hash consistency) and content keywords in SKILL.md, allowing multiple valid implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests compile the Go tool, execute the binary as subprocess, and assert on stdout/stderr/exit codes; SKILL.md tests do text checks but tool tests are behavioral.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning empty/default would fail tests like test_verify_tool_extracts_methods which requires '(Server).Start' in output and test_verify_tool_sorted_output requiring specific names.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all major requirements: AST parsing, method receiver format, sorting, hash consistency, multi-file, no-args usage, and SKILL.md frontmatter/content.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Config file update) and have descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: TSV format 'name<TAB>sha256_hash' with first 16 hex chars is specified in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: No typos observed in paths or commands.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references directories/files appropriate to task scope without pinpointing specific lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: SKILL.md is a new file creation localized to .claude/skills/split-file/, not modifying unrelated config.
